title: Renewable Vaults
description: Vaults now are more usefull, as they now can be opened as many times as you want
body:
Tired of looking for a lot of trial chambers to get any specific loot? With this datapack you'll only need 1 trial chamber to get all possible loot from vaults and ominous vaults.

You only need to be in a radius of 2 blocks from the vault or ominous vault
This datapack detects if you're 2 blocks away (horizontally), and edits the data to delete the information of whitch player opened it. So now, the vaults, of any kind, are renewable

# Important
For the 1.20.5/.6 version you need to have the 1.21 experimental Datapack enable
